prompt: Repair the packed-record migration implementation. The decoder must continue to accept the exact legacy v0 packed layout and must accept only complete, valid v1 records. The encoder must emit only the aligned v1 layout. Preserve the documented little-endian v0 and big-endian v1 byte order, the v1 alignment and zero-padding rules, and the existing status-code behavior for malformed, truncated, trailing, or unrepresentable lengths. Do not change the public API or tests.
